meta.criteria: 2,000+ reviews, 95%+ positive, priced ≤ $20, low ownership tier (under ~200k owners)

games.name: A Castle Full of Cats
games.pitch: Hunt down every hidden cat in a hand-drawn castle. Pure cozy, pure charm.

games.name: Aventura Copilului Albastru și Urât
games.pitch: A surreal Romanian point-and-click that shouldn't work and completely does.

games.name: The Upturned
games.pitch: Dreamlike horror-adventure with an art style you won't forget.

games.name: Patrick's Parabox
games.pitch: Push boxes into boxes into themselves. A genuinely mind-bending recursive puzzler.

games.name: Smushi Come Home
games.pitch: A tiny mushroom's journey home. Small, calm, and adorable.

games.name: Lil Gator Game
games.pitch: A wholesome cardboard-sword adventure about kids playing pretend. Zelda-lite, zero stress.

games.name: Buy a Croquette!
games.pitch: Just try to buy a croquette. It will not be that simple. Free and hilarious.

games.name: A Building Full of Cats
games.pitch: More cats, more hiding spots. The follow-up to the castle, and just as sweet.

games.name: Look Outside
games.pitch: Survival-horror RPG with one rule: do not look outside. Deeply unsettling.

games.name: Threefold Recital
games.pitch: A gorgeous wuxia visual novel with real depth and beautiful art.

games.name: planetarian HD
games.pitch: A robot, a ruined city, and one of the most quietly devastating short stories in games.

games.name: 星空列车与白的旅行 (Starlight Train)
games.pitch: A tender narrative adventure about a train, a journey, and letting go.

games.name: Word Game: Episode 0
games.pitch: A comedic adventure that keeps pulling the rug out from under you. Free.

games.name: Picayune Dreams
games.pitch: A bullet-heaven roguelite wrapped in a strange, dreamy story. Way more than it looks.

games.name: OneShot: World Machine Edition
games.pitch: A meta puzzle-adventure where you, not just the character, matter. Unforgettable.

games.name: Papa's Pizzeria Deluxe
games.pitch: The beloved time-management classic, remade. Endlessly moreish.

games.name: Summer Pockets
games.pitch: A sprawling summer-island visual novel from the masters of the tearjerker.

games.name: The Supper
games.pitch: A short, dark point-and-click revenge tale over a single evening. Free.

games.name: Felvidek
games.pitch: A lo-fi medieval RPG about a washed-up, drunk knight. Bleak, funny, unique.

games.name: White Knuckle
games.pitch: A tense first-person climbing game racing a rising threat below you. White-knuckle indeed.

games.name: Your Turn To Die -Death Game By Majority-
games.pitch: A social-deduction horror VN where you vote on who dies. Gripping.

games.name: Touhou Tenkuushou ~ Hidden Star in Four Seasons
games.pitch: A dazzling bullet-hell shmup. Beautiful, brutal, and endlessly replayable.

games.name: I Am Your Beast
games.pitch: Fast, punchy one-man-army revenge action from Strange Scaffold. Pure adrenaline.

games.name: Milo and the Magpies
games.pitch: Help a cat find his way home through hand-painted gardens. Gorgeous and gentle.

games.name: Epiphyllum in Love
games.pitch: A heartfelt, beautifully illustrated romance visual novel.

games.name: Cureocity
games.pitch: A clever, satisfying free puzzle game that respects your time.

games.name: Katawa Shoujo
games.pitch: The landmark free visual novel. Far more heartfelt and human than its reputation suggests.

games.name: Ticy Adventure Club
games.pitch: A charming free adventure that flew completely under the radar.

games.name: Swallow the Sea
games.pitch: A short, meditative free experience about growing and consuming. Quietly lovely.

games.name: I commissioned some bees 0
games.pitch: A tiny, playful puzzle toy about bees. Free and delightfully strange.

games.name: The Good Time Garden
games.pitch: A chaotic, gross-out little sandbox that's more fun than it has any right to be. Free.

games.name: one night, hot springs
games.pitch: A short, warm free visual novel about a trans woman's night at the hot springs.
